channel.title: Event-Sourcing on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Event-Sourcing on Pi Stack

item.title: Self-Hosted CQRS Platforms — Axon Server vs EventStoreDB vs Apache Kafka 2026
item.description: The Command Query Responsibility Segregation (CQRS) pattern separates read and write operations in your application, optimizing each for its specific use case. When combined with event sourcing — storing state changes as an immutable sequence of events — CQRS becomes a powerful architecture for complex domains, audit-heavy applications, and systems that need to replay or reconstruct state over time.
